channel.title: TECHATPARK - BUILDING PRO-GRAMMERS !
channel.description: Recent content on TECHATPARK - BUILDING PRO-GRAMMERS !

item.title: Logging in Java
item.description: Logging Greatness: For many years, logs have been an essential part of troubleshooting application and infrastructure performance. They help provide visibility into how our applications are running on each of the various infrastructure components. Log data contains information such as out of memory exception or hard disk errors. This is very helpful information that will help us identify the “why” behind a problem either that a user has brought to our attention or that we have uncovered.

item.title: Why Opensource is a serious business (today) ?
item.description: Opensource is everywhere today. Be it the mobiles we use or cloud, Opensource is behind most of the things we enjoy today. What is it really ? Opensource means technology that is run by some great people who does not care about much money and makes cheap business solutions. Fair ?! Might be few decades ago. An Idea which is considered stupid by many, slowly and steadily it proved its worth.

item.title: Open Source means Business
item.description: Open Source is a stupid idea Foundation of Software Talent Company System - Govt/Educaion Definition “Opensource means technology that is run by some great people who does not care about much money and makes cheap business solutions.” Testing Times Software Development - Developing Software Work around the product - work on the product One Solution fits all to One Solutions fits with all Design for destruction THE CHANGE Software Recipes THE Skills THE Mindset THE Purpose Lets Buy the Skill Fresh Talent Experience Fresh Talent Tier 1 Strong Academics Good English Experience DS and Algo Value of Words The REAL Problem 3 Months Notice Company Reduce Salary to 50% (9L) Market Resumes Pachai gets an offer 11L 2 Month More Pachai gets an offer 13L 1 Month More Pachai gets an offer 15L 15 Days More Pachai gets an offer 17L Just few Days More ?

item.title: Post No. 1
item.description: Achievements More than 80% of our students are first-generation engineers of their families. We positioned a candidate for a startup that happily accepted 6 consecutive students. Today techatpark is run by our own eX-students.

item.title: Post No. 1
item.description: The idea of TECH@PARK was not born in any boardroom discussions. We are not backed by any funding houses. We are a group of like-minded techies who commit our time and effort to give back to the society for a larger social cause. We do not have classrooms or paid instructors. But still, we have made a difference in the quality of talents we produce. Our results are different because our method itself is different.

item.title: Post No. 1
item.description: Our Values Chosen We handpick our students. If one gets into us, it means he/she deserves 'IT'! Up to Date Professionally Trained by experts from industry. Our syllabus is always evolving with current market needs/trends.. No waiting time Our students are technically productive from day 1

item.title: Post No. 1
item.description: Schoolership We have been in the process of building great teams for little more that a decade. If you are looking to build development team from the scratch and also help us to place our candidates below is how we shall justify-content-center Rent a Team from us (4 Enginmeers-1 Volunteer) We provide training on the technogies Hire the team (once you and the trainee are in mutuall agrement)
